laws.title: Kentucky Minimum Wage — $7.25/hr (Federal Rate)
laws.summary: Kentucky's state minimum wage equals the federal minimum of $7.25 per hour, with no state-level increase currently scheduled. Tipped employees may be paid $2.13/hour from the employer provided total compensation (wage plus tips) reaches at least $7.25/hour.
compliance_actions: Pay all non-exempt employees at least $7.25/hour
For tipped employees, confirm employer-paid wage plus tips equals at least $7.25/hour
Post the Kentucky Wage and Hour Notice in a conspicuous workplace location
Retain payroll records showing hours worked and wages paid for at least 3 years
